name: dotclaude
description: AI dev infrastructure for Claude Code — a consumable base (auditor agents + operating-discipline + universal guard hooks, used as-is) plus a thin generator (/dotclaude:bootstrap authors only the un-shareable project layer on top).

plugins.name: dotclaude
plugins.description: AI dev infrastructure for Claude Code, delivered as a consumable base + a thin generator. Enable the plugin and a project gets a ready-made universal layer used as-is — the operating-discipline skill (how to work), 14 auditor/designer agents (code-review, ux-audit, a11y-audit, interaction-audit, flow-audit, pages-audit, design-token-audit, pre-flight, test-architect, data-integrity, skill-vs-code-audit, product-direction-validator, product-designer, flow-continuity-review), process/knowledge/UI skills, and universal guard hooks. /dotclaude:bootstrap then authors only the un-shareable project layer (identity, architecture, quality-bar, knowledge graph) and a thin CLAUDE.md that points at the consumed base. Agents derive project specifics at runtime, so the base adapts without per-project authoring.
